description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a pale green exterior and a prominent, symmetrical facade. The front features a central staircase leading up to a raised entryway, flanked by two small trees and enclosed by a low stone wall. Large, multi-pane windows are evenly spaced on both floors, and a decorative circular window sits above the main entrance. The roof is a gray gable style with a small central dormer, adding architectural interest. The house includes a side patio or terrace area, visible from the side views, and a modest garden area in front.
description: A pale green, two-story house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, a central staircase, and a small front garden.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gable end, two circular windows, and a side patio area.
description_view_1: Rear view with large windows, a back door, and a terrace area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a single circular window and a clear view of the front garden and patio.
description_view_3: Front view with a central staircase, symmetrical windows, a decorative circular window, and a landscaped entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central staircase with raised entry, flanked by small trees, low stone wall, and a decorative circular window above the door.
